name: web-tools
description: Search the web and scrape websites. Extract job postings, news, prices, and any structured data from any URL.

setup_steps.label: Install Python dependencies
setup_steps.install_command: pip install duckduckgo-search beautifulsoup4 requests lxml
setup_steps.help_text: Installs DuckDuckGo search, BeautifulSoup for HTML parsing, and requests for HTTP.
